entries.text: Armament category. Armaments belonging to the same category exhibit similar properties.
The types of physical damage dealt by this armament. Other than standard physical damage, striking, slashing, and piercing damage can also be dealt.
Maximum number of this item held per slot
The degree to which physical damage is negated while guarding
The degree to which magic damage is negated while guarding
The degree to which fire damage is negated while guarding
The degree to which lightning damage is negated while guarding
The degree to which holy damage is negated while guarding
The strength of critical hits, which can be performed on enemies you have got behind or stance-broken.
The stability of character's defense. Reduces drain on stamina while blocking.
The distance this weapon's projectiles will travel effectively
The degree to which sorceries increase in power
The degree to which incantations increase in power
FP required to use this item
FP required for follow-up after skill activation
FP required for follow-up charge attack performed by holding down skill activation button or using additional input
FP required to cast this sorcery/incantation
FP required for follow-up after casting sorcery/incantation
The degree to which this armament's attacks scale with strength
The degree to which this armament's attacks scale with dexterity
The degree to which this armament's attacks scale with intelligence
The degree to which this armament's attacks scale with faith
The degree to which this item's power or passive effects scale with strength
The degree to which this item's power or passive effects scale with dexterity
The degree to which this item's power or passive effects scale with intelligence
The degree to which this item's power or passive effects scale with faith
The degree to which this item's power or passive effects scale with arcane
The degree to which this armament's attacks scale with arcane
Type of item. Shows whether or not it will be consumed with use.
Usable with swords, axes, and hammers (excluding small armaments and thrusting swords)
Usable with medium and large armaments capable of thrusting
Usable with swords, axes, and polearms (excluding colossal weapons)
Usable with swords, axes, and hammers (excluding small and medium swords)
Usable with armaments capable of thrusting (excluding colossal weapons)
Usable with axes and hammers, as well as curved swords, greatswords, and reapers (excluding colossal weapons)
Usable with swords and polearms capable of slashing (excluding colossal weapons)
Usable with large and colossal axes and hammers
Usable with large and colossal weapons capable of thrusting, spears, and twinblades
Usable with small and medium swords (excluding twinblades)
Usable with small and medium swords, axes, hammers, and polearms (excluding great spears)
Usable with polearms capable of thrusting, heavy thrusting swords, and twinblades
Usable with swords capable of slashing, axes, hammers, and polearms (excluding small and colossal weapons)
Usable with swords, axes, and polearms capable of slashing (excluding colossal weapons and great spears)
Usable with polearms capable of thrusting and twinblades
Usable with melee armaments (excluding small armaments and whips)
Usable with swords (excluding colossal weapons and twinblades)
Usable with swords, axes, and hammers
Usable with swords and axes (excluding small and colossal axes)
Usable with small and medium swords
Usable with polearms and twinblades (excluding great spears)
Usable with small melee armaments and curved swords
Usable with small and medium shields
Usable with light bows and longbows
Usable with greataxes, great hammers, and colossal weapons
Usable with small and medium straight swords and thrusting swords
Usable with swords as well as polearms capable of thrusting (excluding colossal weapons)
Usable with large and colossal swords, axes, and hammers
Usable with melee armaments (excluding daggers, thrusting swords, and whips)
Usable with axes and hammers as well as curved swords and greatswords (excluding colossal weapons)
Usable with melee armaments (excluding whips, fists, and claws)
Usable with melee armaments (excluding colossal weapons and whips)
Usable with swords as well as polearms capable of thrusting (excluding small and colossal weapons)
Usable with daggers, curved swords, thrusting swords, fists, claws, and small and medium shields
Usable with swords and axes (excluding colossal axes)
Usable with greataxes, great hammers, great spears, and colossal weapons
Adjust brightness until the image on the right is barely visible

A many-legged beast appearing from shadow, carrying on its back a chain-link sword used to hunt its prey. Between the fangs of its many heads flicker overwhelming flames. When assailed by multiple shadows, only sacred light can hinder the hunt.

A colossal, crooked black frame capable of harboring lightning, with massive jaws, lined with grinding teeth to devour anything and everything it encounters.
Only poison will stop it in its tracks.

A flying insect and living shears that trail the earth. Those lucky enough to escape the former's rain of magic light fall victim to the shears. If moth poison is ingested, it will eat through the host— a parasite that cannot be removed alone.

An unknown entity that drifts through the skies. It makes an ocean of its surroundings, that it may blend with whatever life is found, as if in a dream. Exercise caution, warriors. The enemy may not always be that which can be seen.

A goat-headed being who pretends to be a man, said to be able to use a dubious form of alchemy. Counterfeit gold causes loss of sanity, beckoning madness. However, those who foment madness are sure to succumb to the selfsame malady in the end.

An ancient centaur consumed with battle. His fervor for the gods he serves yet burns within, wielding a sacred form of the Night's power. According to legend, the mightily radiant gods were able to conceal themselves in the roar of thunder.

A prehistoric dragon which lurks within fog. The great shadowy pair of eyes, framed in frigid mist, are said to appear at history's great junctures. Its coldness can readily purloin the living warmth of its victims.

Beyond the boundless Night there lies the hazy figure of a person. That is the Night's origin, and enemy to the world.
The signs shall reveal—where the footprints of the Primordial Nightlord lead.
Defeat the last Nightlord to appear
N.B. Cannot set out to the Deep of Night
N.B. Will not affect the Deep of Night
N.B. Personal objectives will be prioritized

The Deep of Night is a battlefield of endless Night. Victory will increase your rating, burnishing your Depth.
The darkness extends unto infinity.
Changing characters will conclude current remembrance
Battle Record - Character Usage and Victories Achieved

A young man long in pursuit of the Nightlord. This swordsman has defied death at every turn with his stunning sixth sense for combat. He swore to avenge the Night in the name of his massacred tribe.
His attributes are balanced throughout maturation, with excellent HP, strength, and dexterity. Able to command all types of melee weapons.
Preference: Greatswords

Pinionfolk knight of the winged realm. A former captain who was injured in a war in which his country's fate hung in the balance. Faced the brunt of the enemy warriors' attacks to protect his flock.
Boasts high HP and stamina, and plays both offense and defense on the frontline, armed with his shield.
Preference: Halberds

Assassin of the Fellowship. He is feared for his split-second judgment and the ability to spot even the most fleeting of chances to strike, earning him the moniker "Ironeye."
Boasts excellent dexterity, and wields control over any battle while firing from a distant range.
Preference: Bows

Virtuous thief and stepdaughter of the viscount. Her ability to swiftly escape anyone's grasp with ease earned her the title of "Duchess."
The Duchess' high dexterity and intelligence allow her to fight with combinations of sorceries and weapons.
Preference: Daggers

A pirate who sailed to the Lands Between from a nearby waterway. The opportunity to try his hand against the Nightlord proved too glorious of an opportunity to pass up.
Boasting high HP and strength, his poise allows him to stand firm against moderate attacks and flatten opponents with vigorous offensives.
Preference: Greataxes, great hammers, and colossal weapons

Doll of the daughter of an aristocratic family that faced ruin. On a fateful night, her soul took possession of the doll's body, and she swore to avenge her disgraced lineage.
While steeped in faith, her other attributes develop at only a modest pace. Plays a supportive role in combat by summoning and manipulating spirits, which have the potential to overwhelm enemies.
Preference: None

One of the Witches of the Deep Forest. A caster of ancient sorceries who dwells in obscurity, far into the heart of the woods. She came to the Lands Between to answer a burning question.
Boasts high intelligence and faith, and is able to deftly cast all manner of spells.
Preference: None

This condemned soul, with a body fused with pieces of armor, went missing after a prison stint in the Lands Between. Brandishes a cursed blade and savors every battle.
Boasts high dexterity and arcane, and is unrivaled in one-on-one fights while armed with his cursed sword.
Preference: Katana
<?keyMove##10?>+<?keyicon@106##10?> while guarding with shield: Steel Guard
Obtain items more often from foes
Cannot be knocked down during skill activation
Raise enemy ghosts to fight as allies
Receive boost while recovering from status ailments
Release <?keyicon@127##10?>: Activate Hold <?keyicon@127##10?>: Retaliatory stance <?keyicon@106##10?>: Take step
Press <?keyicon@127##10?> against foe with affinity residue: Activate Hold <?keyicon@127##10?>: Cancel
<?keyicon@126##10?>: Activate Keep holding <?keyicon@126##10?>: Raise protective area
Reason for Report (Select all that apply)
If you continue to remain inactive you will be removed from session
Voices in weapon form a blessing
The Sacrificial Twig preserved collected runes
The Twiggy Cracked Tear preserved collected runes
The Great Site of Grace has been altered
A demon reveals an inescapable eye
A demon offers a false blessing
Objective location can now be examined
Objective location can now be examined
Objective location can now be examined
Objective location can now be examined
Objective location can now be examined
Objective location can now be examined
Objective location can now be examined
The demon's power has been lost
Failed to overcome the trial of the ascetic
Gained strength by overcoming the trial of the ascetic
A bargain has been struck to fight at full strength
The master of bubbles was felled
A deal with a demon has cleansed the curse
A failed deal has sown enmity
A plague of locusts befalls the land
Find the enemy who is stealing runes
Plague of locusts has died down
The hordes of Night were worn down by <?codenameIcon?>.
Rise's contraption unlocked by another world
A place once sealed is now open
ELDEN RING NIGHTREIGN Online Service Terms
This game is still under development
Launch grappling claw to rope foes in or move swiftly by retracting.
Beat wing to whip up a wind-churning cyclone.
Cut foe with dagger, creating temporary weak point.
Stage reprisal of recent occurrences to damage nearby foes.
Assume attack stance and pummel vigorously.
Play lyre to summon fallen family to rally in battle.
Collect the affinity residues of targets to fire an affinity-exploiting magic cocktail.
Draw a cursed sword that can deflect enemy attacks.
Draw the Executor's golden sword that can deflect enemy attacks.
Whether targets can be roped in or not depends on enemy physique. Effective at breaking guard. Hold to aim.
Enemies caught in cyclone are drawn toward center. Sweeps away lightweight projectiles. Hold to enlarge range.
Inflict damage on temporary weak point to destroy it and stagger foes. Damaging weak point extends its duration.
Damage to phantoms affects original. This skill can be used at any time.
A defensive posture which reduces incoming damage. An enhanced skill which causes even larger enemies to recoil.
Choose to summon Helen the agile page, Frederick the burly cook, or Sebastian the doting butler.
Affinity residues accumulate. Collect three to wield a magic spell. Complex affinity combinations create more powerful spells.
Repeated deflections reveal blade, enabling powerful attacks with the living sword. Cannot run while at ready with enchanted blade.
Repeated deflections reveal blade, enabling powerful attacks with the living sword. The blade lost its voice, but is forever loyal to its master.
Powerful single attack that launches an iron stake with a great explosion.
Leap up and dive back down to raise protective area.
Fire powerful arrow that surpasses sound and ignores any defense.
Obscure self and surrounding allies to hide from foes.
Drive gravekeeper's wedge into earth to summon a giant tombstone.
Release vengeful ire to make self and nearby allies immortal.
Unleash forbidden blood chant to brand nearby foes with blood sigils.
Assume the form of the primordial beast.
Recoil causes one to reel back, but preserves a portion of Ultimate Art gauge. Hold to boost impact and remain standing.
Can move briefly while in air, and diving attack is perfect for rescues. Hold to shield nearby allies from damage.
Arrow pierces all types of enemies, terrains, and structures. Hold to draw bow and aim before firing.
Enemies lose track of the caster, wandering aimlessly or becoming prone to leaving themselves vulnerable.
Tombstone radiates protective aura, boosting strength of nearby allies and blocking arrows. Can also be climbed.
Revives near-death allies, and transforms family into immortal warriors.
Brands foes with short-lived Blood Sigils that increase damage taken and restore the HP and FP of caster.
Use unique attacks in beast form that drain the Ultimate Art gauge. Activate again to quickly undo transformation.
Plant feet and brace with shield for a more powerful guard.
A keenly observant eye discovers more items to obtain from foes.
Attack and dodge optimally, dodging repeatedly when necessary.
Taking damage boosts Retaliate potency. Attack power boosted when HP is greatly reduced.
Raise enemy ghosts to fight as allies.
Discover affinity residues that can be collected to replenish FP.
Receive boost after recovering from status ailments.
This ability can only be used once until restored through revival from death or passing through a Site of Grace.
Greatly improves guard boost, but prevents running while holding up shield.
The effect of this ability also applies to allies.
Reduces stamina reduction from attacks and evasive actions. Allows up to two consecutive evasive actions.
While skill is active, remain standing with a sliver of HP even after taking heavy damage.
Ghosts are summoned to fight, but are fleeting and dissipate after some time.
Affinity attacks create affinity residues. Residues appear for allies, as well, which can also be collected.
Effect boosts attack and stamina recovery speed.
Rains gather, portending the tide of Night
